input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A blonde woman wearing a black and white striped shirt transitions from waving her right hand to resting both hands on a surface. Her mouth closes from an open greeting into a smile. Behind her, white built-in shelves display various decor items, flanked by black leather sofas with pillows in a bright living room setting.</think><answer></answer>

Hands with a gold studded cuff pull ribbons to tighten the pouch. [6-10] A product page shows a red pouch with red and blue dice. Text: "Jewelry Pouch", "POPPY AMALFI LAMB", "$ 75.00", "MONOGRAM (ADDITIONAL FEE APPLIES)", "ADD TO SHOPPING BAG", "ALSO AVAILABLE IN". [10-14] The woman gestures with open arms. A teal leather pouch with beige drawstrings sits top-down near glass perfume bottles, a gold bangle, and a "BOSS" necklace. Hands close the drawstrings, and the woman holds the gathered teal pouch.

recent_thinks: [14-16] Three small drawstring pouches line up horizontally: teal with beige ribbon, leopard print with pink ribbon, and cream with blue ribbon. The view then returns to the blonde woman in the black and white striped shirt, standing centrally in the bright living room with hands on the table.

[16-18] The video cuts from the woman in the striped shirt to a white background. Centered text reads "DIY JEWELRY POUCH" in light blue sans-serif font. Above the text sits a yellow graphic illustration of a sun with rays extending outward.

[18-20] The video cuts from the "DIY JEWELRY POUCH" title card to the blonde woman in a black and white striped shirt. She stands in a living room with white shelves and black sofas behind her. She smiles at the camera, resting her hands on a wooden table surface in the foreground.

compressed_segments.text: [0-2] A blonde woman in a black and white striped shirt waves then rests hands on a surface, smiling, before white shelves and black leather sofas. [2-6] On white marble, a coral leather drawstring pouch with pink ribbons sits near a gold ring with a square turquoise stone and a "Le Bain" box. Hands with a gold studded cuff pull ribbons to tighten the pouch. [6-10] A product page shows a red pouch with red and blue dice. Text: "Jewelry Pouch", "POPPY AMALFI LAMB", "$ 75.00", "MONOGRAM (ADDITIONAL FEE APPLIES)", "ADD TO SHOPPING BAG", "ALSO AVAILABLE IN". [10-14] The woman gestures with open arms. A teal leather pouch with beige drawstrings sits top-down near glass perfume bottles, a gold bangle, and a "BOSS" necklace. Hands close the drawstrings, and the woman holds the gathered teal pouch. [14-16] Three small drawstring pouches (teal/beige, leopard/pink, cream/blue) are displayed, followed by a blonde woman in a striped shirt standing in a living room. [16-18] A title card reads "DIY JEWELRY POUCH" with a yellow sun graphic. [18-20] The woman smiles with hands on a table. [20-22] Three material swatches are shown: textured tan, smooth dark teal, and smooth cream. [22-24] Three ribbon bundles

[92-104] Close-up footage shows hands with light pink nail polish threading a beige ribbon through punched holes along the edge of a teal circular leather piece resting on a white grid cutting mat. The hands guide the ribbon carefully through each perforation, pulling it taut to weave it around the circumference. This action continues the process of creating a drawstring closure mechanism for the pouch, with the beige ribbon extending across the surface as it is manipulated through the holes.

[104-110] Hands press flat against the center of a teal circular sheet while weaving a beige ribbon through perimeter holes on a white grid mat. [110-112] Pulling the ribbon ends cinches the material, transforming the flat sheet into a gathered, three-dimensional pouch. [112-118] A blonde woman in a black and white striped shirt stands behind the table with the pouch. She rests her hands near the item, then opens the gathered teal pouch to reveal a tan interior lining, demonstrating the drawstring mechanism woven through the edge holes.

[118-120] Close-up shots show hands manipulating a teal leather pouch with a tan interior on a white grid cutting mat, pulling gathered sides apart to reveal the space while adjusting the beige ribbon drawstring. [120-124] A blonde woman in a black and white striped shirt stands behind the table, lifting the closed teal pouch from the mat to her chest level and smiling broadly. [124-128] Close-ups focus on the pouch held against her shirt; hands wearing a gold bracelet and ring rotate it to display the gathered top with tan lining and the smooth, rounded teal bottom. [128-130] Finally, the teal pouch sits centrally on a white surface with extended ribbons, while a red pouch and a leopard print pouch are visible in the blurred background.

[132-134] Hands pull beige ribbons to cinch a teal leather pouch closed on a white surface, gathering the material tightly. Nearby, perfume bottles, a gold bangle, and a beaded necklace rest on the table, remaining stationary as the pouch is secured. [134-136] The scene transitions to show three finished drawstring pouches: a teal one with a beige bow, a leopard print one with a pink bow, and a cream one with a blue bow. The view shifts to focus on the cream pouch alongside a black pouch with white ribbons. [136-138] The camera pans right, moving a black pouch with white ribbons to the left. This reveals a tan textured pouch with teal ribbons entering the view on the right. [138-140] The camera centers on a tan textured pouch with teal ribbons next to a black velvet pouch with white ribbons. The tan pouch features a gathered top closure, while the black pouch sits to the side with white drawstrings extended outward on the white surface.

recent_thinks: [76-78] The teal circular material featuring evenly spaced holes around its perimeter rests on the white grid cutting mat. The hand previously holding the right edge and the silver hole punch tool on the left are removed from the frame, leaving the finished punched circle isolated and centered on the surface.

[130-132] The teal pouch sits closed on a white surface with blurred red and leopard print pouches in the background. Hands then open the pouch to reveal rings inside, while perfume bottles, a gold bangle, and a beaded necklace rest on the table nearby.

[140-142] The camera pans right, shifting the black velvet pouch with white ribbons toward the left edge of the frame. A tan textured pouch with teal ribbons becomes the central focus on the white surface, displaying its gathered top closure and pebbled material texture clearly next to the black bag.

[142-144] The camera pans right across a white surface, shifting focus from a black velvet pouch with white ribbons on the left to a tan textured pouch with teal ribbons on the right. The black pouch moves toward the edge of the frame as the tan pouch becomes the central subject, displaying its gathered closure.

input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).
